description: A C2 operator must coordinate air, ground, and intelligence assets to support a special operations team conducting a raid.

nodes.task_description: Maintain real-time tracking of the ground team and all supporting assets.

expected_outcome.value: Operator keeps a constant, accurate plot of all friendly forces.

nodes.task_description: Receive a request from the ground team for immediate drone surveillance of a nearby building.

expected_outcome.value: Operator correctly processes the request for support.

nodes.task_description: Dynamically re-task a nearby ISR drone to provide video of the requested building and stream the feed to the ground team.

expected_outcome.value: Operator successfully re-tasks the drone and provides the requested intelligence.
